theme_and_archetype.archetype: Archetype 4 (Swiss & High-Contrast) for Light Mode, Archetype 5 (Jewel & Luxury) for Premium Mode
theme_and_archetype.reasoning: A bold, confident, and modern aesthetic that evokes conversation and connection without feeling cheesy. High contrast and Swiss structure give it a premium utility feel, while the luxury dark mode elevates the premium paywall.

headings.rules: Never use Inter for headings. Use tight letter spacing.

colors.rules: Tinted greys only. Use Spark Orange/Coral (#FF5A36) for primary actions. DO NOT use Purple or Teal. Ensure 4.5:1 contrast.

spacing_and_layout.scale: p-4, p-6, p-8 for inner cards. pb-24 for content above tab bar to prevent overlap.
spacing_and_layout.grid: Bento Grid for categories (Home Screen) - grid-cols-2 with span variations.
spacing_and_layout.alignment: Left-align dense text and chat inputs. Center-align premium/paywall content.

navigation.style: Floating glassmorphism (backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/70 or bg-black/60). 1px subtle inner border.

cards.daily_icebreaker: Large swipeable card, taking 60vh. Neumorphic or sharp edges with bold typography. Must have data-testid='daily-card'.
cards.category_item: Bento style. Image background with bg-black/40 overlay. White text, bottom-left aligned.

chat_interface.layout: Bottom input field + recent history at top. Actions on right.
chat_interface.ai_response: Title size (text-2xl), font-bold for the main icebreaker line. Subtle 14pt for context.

paywall.style: Full screen, dark mode (Archetype 5). Uses luxury dark texture background.
paywall.cta: Large bold button, Spark Orange. text-xl font-bold. width full.

buttons.primary: Solid Spark Orange, white text. Hover/Active: lighter hue.
buttons.secondary: Outline with 1px border, high contrast text.

motion.transitions: Smooth spring animations for tab switching and chat bubble entrance.

onboarding_bg.description: Friends laughing and sharing pizza, representing social connection

instructions_to_main_agent: Build a mobile-first layout. Since it's a React Native Expo app (or mobile-web approximation), use NativeWind or standard Tailwind CSS utilities suitable for small screens.
Implement the bottom tab bar with glassmorphism (backdrop-blur-xl). Must ensure padding-bottom on main scroll views so content isn't hidden by the floating tab bar.
For the AI Chat screen, place the user input field fixed at the bottom with a clear send icon, displaying chat history above. Reverse column direction for natural chat scroll.
Apply 'Outfit' or a similar bold Sans-Serif font for Headings. DO NOT use generic 'Inter' for display text.
Images for category cards (Club, Beach, Cafe) must use a bg-black/40 overlay mask to ensure white text remains readable.
The Paywall screen should feel highly premium: use dark mode, full screen luxury texture background, high-contrast text, and a bold Spark Orange CTA button.
Ensure UI accommodates both EN and FR string lengths (allow wrapping where necessary).
Do not use emojis for icons. Use lucide-react-native.
